mapper.select: SELECT agreement_id, agreement_type, version, title, summary, content, is_current, effective_date, create_time, update_time FROM user_agreement WHERE is_current = 1 ORDER BY agreement_type

SELECT agreement_id, agreement_type, version, title, summary, content, is_current, effective_date, create_time, update_time FROM user_agreement WHERE agreement_type = #{agreementType} AND is_current = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT agreement_id, agreement_type, version, title, summary, content, is_current, effective_date, create_time, update_time FROM user_agreement WHERE agreement_id = #{agreementId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_agreement ( agreement_type, version, title, summary, content, is_current, effective_date, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{agreementType}, #{version}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{isCurrent}, #{effectiveDate}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_agreement SET is_current = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE agreement_type = #{agreementType} AND is_current = 1
